_format.note: Admission types — the protagonist's starting state for a run. Each admission has a different starting voice (admissionProse, the first scene), a name (institutional designation), composure (starting max), startingAttachments (id list), startingWards (patient id list — these are wards already 'filed' before the run begins, available for use), and unlockHint. Admissions unlock as the player completes runs (logged in archive).

0413.name: Patient 0413
0413.subtitle: Admitted [[8]] · file open
0413.voice: I do not remember writing the address. The nurse was expecting me.
admissionProse: I found the address on a card I do not remember writing. The road ended at the building.
The nurse opened the door before I knocked. She said they were expecting me. She handed me a file. She said it had been waiting.
Five descents. One corridor at a time. !!The door at the top is locked from this side.!!

0412.name: Patient 0412
0412.subtitle: Admitted [[?]] · ~~file closed~~ file reopened
0412.voice: I was already here. They have not changed the room.
admissionProse: There was a file at the desk with my designation. The handwriting was mine. The file had been opened before.
The nurse did not ask what I remembered. She said the room was the same. ~~She said I had asked for the same room.~~
I do not remember what I learned the last time. ~~Some of them remember me.~~

0414.name: Patient 0414
0414.subtitle: Admitted [[12]] · self-referred
0414.voice: I came in on my own. I would like to be ~~kept~~ helped.
admissionProse: I asked to be admitted. The nurse did not seem surprised. She said the room was ready.
I brought a list of names. I told her some of them might be here already.
~~She thanked me for the list.~~ She filed it. She said I would see them in turn.
0414.unlockHint: File three patients across all runs.
